records.ety: [L. fortitudo, fr. fortis strong. See Fort.]

defs: Power to resist attack; strength; firmness.
quotes: The fortitude of the place is best known to you.

defs: That strength or firmness of mind which enables a person to encounter danger with coolness and courage, or to bear pain or adversity without murmuring, depression, or despondency; passive courage; resolute endurance; firmness in confronting or bearing up against danger or enduring trouble.
quotes: Extolling patience as the truest fortitude.
Fortitude is the guard and support of the other virtues.
